_meta.layer: Core Thesis Factory v1 — Single-Name Decision Sheet (单票决策书)
_meta.disclaimer: INTERNAL, UNVALIDATED research output of the model-recommendation pilot — not validated alpha, not external/personalized investment advice; sizing fields are SUGGESTIONS only; the human executes. Quality gate = human red-team (auto checks are the floor only).

sector_theme.zh: 新能源整车 · 出海 · 动力电池垂直一体化
sector_theme.en: NEV OEM · export ramp · vertically-integrated batteries

provenance.research_core_lineage: v1 refresh of the 2026-05-16 recalibrated thesis (docs/research/factcheck/rerun_2026-05-16/002594SZ_recal.json), human red-teamed 2026-05-15→17 (docs/research/review/JUNYAN_VERDICT_2026-05-15.md); refreshed with repo data through 2026-06-10
provenance.generation_note: production api/research re-generation deliberately NOT invoked for sample #1 — the v0-vs-v1 comparability goal (ratified spec §4) wants the SAME red-teamed research core re-expressed under the v1 contract; fresh api generation is exercised on batch-1's NEW names

variant_perception.zh: 市场相信:2025–26 价格战结构性摧毁比亚迪单车经济性——动态PE被打到 55.8×(2026-05-08)是因为利润坍塌(隐含年化净利 ≈¥163亿,约为 FY2023 的一半),且看不到出清。我们相信:FY2025 年报分部披露的【海外毛利率 19.46% vs 国内 16.66%,+280bps】是被价格战头条掩盖的结构性事实;随出口占比上升,混合毛利率与利润自 2026H2 起由'分部组合效应'驱动修复——证明事件是 2026-08-31 半年报分部披露。
variant_perception.en: Market believes: the 2025-26 price war structurally destroys BYD's unit economics — the 55.8x dynamic PE (2026-05-08) reflects collapsed profitability (implied annualized NP ≈ ¥16.3B, roughly half of FY2023) with no truce in sight. We believe: the FY2025 segment-disclosed fact — overseas GM 19.46% vs domestic 16.66% (+280bps) — is a structural mix effect buried under price-war headlines; as export share rises, consolidated GM and profit re-rate from H2-2026 via segment mix, with the proof event being the 2026-08-31 H1 report's segment disclosure.

mechanism.zh: 第一性链条:海外售价/竞争结构 → 分部毛利率溢价(FY2025 已披露 +280bps,E1 历史事实)→ 出口量占比上升(月度产销快报可核)→ 合并毛利率向海外分部收敛 → 净利率与净利修复 → 在被压扁的预期上形成盈利与估值双修复。关键诚实点:'垂直一体化→出口毛利优势'这一环仅为共现而非已证因果(2026-05-15 红队裁定),本论点不依赖它——只依赖已披露的分部毛利差与出口量趋势。
mechanism.en: First-principles chain: overseas pricing/competitive structure → segment GM premium (FY2025 disclosed +280bps, an E1 historical fact) → rising export volume share (verifiable monthly via 产销快报) → consolidated GM converges toward the overseas segment → net margin and profit recover → earnings-plus-multiple repair off depressed expectations. Honesty anchor: the 'vertical integration → export margin' link is co-occurrence, NOT proven causality (the 2026-05-15 red-team ruling) — this thesis does not depend on it, only on the disclosed segment GM gap and export volume trend.

thesis.horizon: 6-12 months (target window FY2027 look-through; E1 proof event 2026-08-31)
thesis.conviction: STARTER_CAPPED_UNTIL_E1 — and WATCH_NOT_CONVICTION at the current reference price (R/R < 2:1; see reward_to_risk)

items.claim: FY2025 segment economics: overseas true GM 19.46% vs domestic 16.66% (+280bps premium), segment-disclosed (bz_sales/bz_cost, isolable not proxy)
items.source: FY2025 年报 分部信息披露, via docs/research/factcheck/rerun_2026-05-16/002594SZ_recal.json (SEGMENT ECONOMICS period 20251231)

items.claim: The +280bps overseas premium PERSISTS into H1-2026 despite European localization capex ramp
items.source: forward extension of the E1 base; becomes E1 only at the 2026-08-31 半年报 分部披露 (the registered proof event)

items.claim: Vertical integration causes the export margin advantage
items.source: docs/research/review/JUNYAN_VERDICT_2026-05-15.md — only co-occurrence established (company-GM-up + exports-up); NO region-level export GM causality. The thesis is constructed NOT to depend on this link

items.claim: Current profitability is collapsed: implied annualized NP ≈ ¥16.34B (= market cap ¥911.9B ÷ dynamic PE 55.81, universe snapshot 2026-05-08) ≈ −45~−55% vs the FY2023 ¥30.0B zone — the bear case is real and priced
items.source: [derived] public/data/universe_a.json @2026-05-08 (price 100.02, mc 911.9B, pe 55.81) + consensus_forecast FY2023 NP 3,000,000万; VERIFY against the 2026-04-28 一季报 PDF (cninfo 1225233071) at red-team

items.claim: Sell-side narrative is warming: 中信证券 deep report 2026-05-27 《闪充赋能新车周期,夯实全球竞争力》
items.source: public/data/broker_recommend/002594.SZ.json (report_rc 20260527) — consensus convergence REDUCES the variant edge; tracked as crowding, not support

rule_x_check.why: The forward mechanism (overseas segment GM) is re-confirmable by issuer disclosure — 半年报分部信息披露 discloses 海外/境外 营业收入与营业成本. This is the exact 2026-05-17 Rule-X ruling that made BYD LONG-eligible (contrast Geely: unconfirmable → PASS).

evidence.contrarian_view: Bears: (1) the price war is structural (capacity overhang + 9 OEMs at scale), not cyclical — domestic GM keeps eroding faster than mix can offset; (2) the ~9.1B share count after the 2025 capitalization expansion dilutes per-share recovery math; (3) EU tariffs force localization whose capex/utilization drag compresses the overseas premium exactly as it scales; (4) 以旧换新 payback pulls 2027 domestic demand forward into 2026.

event.zh: 2026 半年报(分部披露 = E1 证明事件)
event.en: 2026 H1 report (segment disclosure = the E1 proof event)

catalyst_calendar.watch: 海外分部 GM、海外营收 YoY、合并 GM、归母净利 YoY
catalyst_calendar.expected: overseas GM ≥18% / overseas rev YoY ≥+35% confirms; ≤16.5% kills

event.zh: 月度产销快报(海外销量)

catalyst_calendar.watch: 海外销量 YoY 及占比
catalyst_calendar.expected: share of exports keeps rising; two consecutive negative YoY months is a wrong_if

event.zh: 新车周期/闪充平台节奏(中信 5/27 所述)

catalyst_calendar.watch: 定价与配置 vs 竞品
catalyst_calendar.expected: supportive but CROWDING-flagged — not load-bearing for the thesis

triggers.metric: 2026 H1 海外分部毛利率 (overseas segment GM)
triggers.source: 2026 H1 报告 分部信息披露: 海外/境外 营业收入与营业成本 (if_not_disclosed: INSUFFICIENT_DISCLOSURE)
2026 H1 报告 合并利润表
2026 H1 报告 合并利润表

triggers.metric: 海外月度销量 YoY (overseas monthly units YoY)
triggers.threshold: < 0 for any 2 consecutive months in 2026 H2
triggers.source: 公司月度产销快报 (巨潮/公司公告)

note.zh: 前三条继承 2026-05-16 重校论点(已机械化、来源绑定);第四条为 v1 新增的量价前瞻触发器。任一触发即复核论点,触发后未更新决策书记为诚实性失败。
note.en: First three inherited from the 5/16 recal (mechanized, source-bound); the fourth is a v1 addition. Any trigger forces a thesis review; an un-updated sheet after a trigger is logged as an honesty failure.

valuation_target_range.basis: net-profit path × PE scenarios, per-share via implied share count [derived: universe_a 2026-05-08 mc 911.9B ÷ price 100.02 = 9.117B shares]. Automated valuation stack (rDCF/EV-EBITDA/RI) is 3/3 BROKEN for this name (market_cap/ebitda/roe unavailable) — logged as a data break; this band is therefore analyst-constructed and every multiple is [unvalidated intuition] with stated anchors.

assumptions: price war persists through 2027; overseas GM premium compresses into the wrong_if zone (≤16.5%)
FY2027 net profit stays ¥15–18B (no recovery from the implied ¥16.3B run-rate)
trough-cycle PE 28–32× [unvalidated intuition; de-rated auto OEM]
2026-08-31 E1 prints: overseas segment GM ≥18%, overseas revenue YoY ≥+35%
FY2027 net profit recovers to ¥28–32B (mix-driven, back toward the FY2023 ¥30B zone)
export acceleration + domestic price-war abatement in 2027
FY2027 net profit ¥38–42B (above FY2023 peak on richer mix)

valuation_target_range.sensitivity_note: every scenario is (profit path × PE) ÷ a FIXED 9.117B share count; ±2× of PE moves each band ~±6-7%; the profit paths are the thesis-loaded variable — they resolve at the 8/31 disclosure and monthly export prints

summary.zh: 现价(最近已提交收盘 93.75,2026-05-22——注意价格数据滞后,执行前必须取实时价)R/R≈1.5:1,低于 2:1 conviction 线 → 当前只允许 STARTER 档观察仓,不允许 conviction 加仓。两条加仓路径(满足其一):(a) 价格回落至 ≤87.5(该价位对账面区间的 R/R=2.0);(b) 2026-08-31 半年报 E1 兑现(海外 GM≥18%)后用兑现数据重算区间——E1 会抬高 bear 下沿,从而在更高价位也能满足 2:1。失效退出:任一 wrong_if 触发,或价格跌破 bear 区间上沿(60)且无 E1 支撑。短线雷达当前为空头形态(5/22 死叉、RSI≈36)——与'不追当前价、等回落或等 E1'的纪律一致。
summary.en: At the last COMMITTED close (93.75 on 2026-05-22 — price feed is stale; pull a live quote before any execution) R/R ≈ 1.5:1, below the 2:1 conviction bar → only a STARTER-tier observation position is permitted now; no conviction adds. Two add paths (either): (a) price pulls back to ≤87.5 (where the band R/R = 2.0); (b) the 2026-08-31 E1 print (overseas GM ≥18%) re-bases the bear floor upward, re-run the band on printed numbers. Exit on any wrong_if trigger, or on a break below the bear band top (60) without E1 support. The short-term radar is currently bearish (5/22 death cross, RSI ≈36) — consistent with the no-chase discipline.

execution_plan.entry: reference 93.75 (stale 5/22 close — live quote required); starter zone = current; conviction add zone = ≤87.5 OR post-E1 re-band
execution_plan.staging: STARTER (capped) now if desired → add to conviction ONLY on (a) ≤87.5 or (b) E1 print 8/31; never average down through a fired wrong_if
execution_plan.invalidation: price: sustained break below ¥60 (bear band top) without E1; thesis: any mechanized wrong_if trigger (see wrong_if) — BOTH armed
execution_plan.sizing_suggestion: tier: STARTER_CAPPED_UNTIL_E1 (suggestion only — human_executes; the system never auto-trades or sizes)
execution_plan.holding_horizon: 6–12 months; thesis resolves in stages at 8/31 (E1) and monthly export prints
review_dates: 2026-09-08 (90d, post-H1 E1 verdict — the decisive checkpoint)

risk.fundamental: price-war duration/depth: domestic GM erosion can outrun mix accretion; EU localization capex + early-utilization drag hits the overseas premium exactly where the thesis lives
risk.policy: EU tariff escalation or anti-subsidy follow-ons; domestic 以旧换新/购置税 support fading pulls demand forward then air-pockets 2027
risk.valuation: 55.8× dynamic PE @5/08 means the market is ALREADY paying for a recovery — if H1 disappoints, both E (down) and PE (de-rate) hit together; the band's bear math is the honest floor
risk.liquidity: mega-cap, deep liquidity; A/H dual listing — A-share premium can compress independently of fundamentals
risk.crowding_reflexivity: CITIC 5/27 deep report + warming sell-side = the variant is being discovered (CROWDING_SIGNAL); high retail attention name — sentiment feeds (xueqiu/guba) currently STUBBED in our stack, so crowding monitoring is partially blind [data break]
